name: Circle USYC
description: USYC is a tokenized money market fund product that provides institutional-grade, yield-bearing onchain exposure to short-term U.S. Treasury bills and reverse repurchase agreements backed by short-term U.S. government securities. Each USYC token serves as a digital representation of a share of Hashnote International Short Duration Fund Ltd., a Cayman Islands registered mutual fund with Circle International Bermuda Limited acting as token administrator.

_meta.notes: Official sources identify the asset as USYC / US Yield Coin. Direct logo URL and official social URL are not yet verified. Launch date is sourced from RWA.xyz and should be cross-checked against fund documents if institutional-grade evidence is required.
